objective: Ship the governance-owned Pages deploy freshness and domain parity verifier (Sprint 3 of epic #467). Implements scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_verifier.py with retry/backoff, cache-busting, redirect-chain recording, stable deployment-id checks, stale-checkout guard, per-domain report, and mocked pytest coverage.
scope_boundary: Sprint 3 of 5 of epic #467; implements the freshness/parity verifier as a standalone governance-owned script.
No writes to seek-and-ponder or any downstream consumer repo; downstream adoption is seek-and-ponder issue #163.
out_of_scope: seek-and-ponder repo writes; downstream adoption is seek-and-ponder issue #163.
research_summary: Sprint 3 of epic #467. Parent plan approved in issue-467-pages-deploy-gate-structured-agent-cycle-plan.json (issue_number: 468, approved by claude-opus-4-6 + gpt-5.4). Verifier requirements derived from Sprint 3 ACs: stale-checkout guard, retry/backoff (3 attempts, 30s window), Cache-Control: no-cache + cache-bust query param, redirect-chain recording, cf-deployment-id header as stable endpoint (no HTML scraping), per-domain report fields (active, deployment-id match, HTTP status, redirect chain, asset-hash mismatch), inactive/CNAME mismatch is non-blocking. Implemented by gpt-5.4 worker; 12/12 pytest cases pass.

sprints.name: Sprint 3 - Freshness + domain parity verifier (issue #470)
sprints.goal: Ship scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_verifier.py with full pytest coverage per Sprint 3 ACs from the parent plan.
tasks: Implement pages_deploy_verifier.py: stale-checkout guard, cache-busting, retry/backoff, redirect-chain recording, cf-deployment-id header check, per-domain report.
Author scripts/pages-deploy/tests/test_pages_deploy_verifier.py covering drift detection, parity-disagreement, retry/backoff, redirect-chain, and stable-endpoint checks.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_verifier.py exists and all 12 pytest cases pass.
Verifier retries with exponential backoff up to 3 attempts within a 30s total window.
Verifier sends Cache-Control: no-cache and a cache-busting query parameter on every probe.
Verifier follows HTTP redirects and records the final URL and full status chain.
Verifier uses cf-deployment-id header for stable comparison; no HTML scraping.
Stale-checkout guard refuses to run against a non-current working tree.
Inactive domain or CNAME mismatch is reported but does not block the deploy gate.

specialist_reviews.summary: Implementation complete; 12/12 pytest cases pass covering all Sprint 3 acceptance criteria from the parent plan.
